appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance: CLI Testing section documenting isolation strategy, testing tools, expected evidence, and verification commands for Docker assertions

frictionsNoted.description: Initial environment had 37 lingering containers from previous test runs. Tests use unique UUID-based container names and clean up properly, but leftover containers from other processes can make pre-test state verification noisy.
frictionsNoted.resolution: Tests use unique container names with UUID suffixes to avoid collisions; cleanup verification focuses on containers created during test execution

evidenceHighlights.VAL-DOCKER-001: test_container_creation_and_destruction passed - container_exists() returns true after DockerSandbox::start()
evidenceHighlights.VAL-DOCKER-002: test_cleanup_on_drop passed - Drop trait cleanup verified; explicit destroy() removes containers; container count reduced appropriately
evidenceHighlights.VAL-DOCKER-003: 3 tests passed - exit codes verified (0 for success, 42 for explicit failure, -1 for timeout), stdout/stderr captured correctly
evidenceHighlights.VAL-DOCKER-004: 4 tests passed - file write/read verified with content matching, subdirectory creation works, nonexistent file error handling correct
evidenceHighlights.VAL-DOCKER-005: 42 tests passed - memory (32GB), PIDs (100/200/500), storage (1GB/2GB/5GB), and network modes (none/bridge) verified via docker inspect
